title: A01 Broken Access Control
content: Enforce least privilege and deny by default.

title: A02 Cryptographic Failures
content: Use strong algorithms and protect keys at rest and in transit.

title: A03 Injection
content: Use parameterized queries and input validation.

title: A04 Insecure Design
content: Threat model and secure design patterns in SDLC.

title: A05 Security Misconfiguration
content: Harden defaults and automate config review.

title: A07 Auth Failures
content: MFA, secure session management, credential stuffing defenses.

title: A08 Data Integrity
content: Verify software supply chain and CI/CD integrity.

title: A09 Logging Failures
content: Centralize logs and protect audit trails.
